claim_boundary: this report closes TAS-183 only. It freezes one no-resume single-run operator envelope on top of the canonical owned `psionic-transformer` route boundary by requiring the unified TAS-182 benchmark gate to stay green, the declared million-step and multi-million-step horizon receipts to stay exact and under floor, the context window to remain small relative to horizon size, and checkpoint/spill/resume lanes to stay explicit negative controls instead of inheriting article closure. It does not imply clean-room weight causality, route minimality, or final article-equivalence green status.
summary: Article single-run no-spill closure now records tied_requirement_satisfied=true, benchmark_gate_green=true, operator_envelope_green=true, deterministic_exactness_green=true, step_consistency_green=true, context_sensitivity_green=true, perturbation_negative_control_green=true, stochastic_mode_robustness_green=true, binding_green=true, blocked_issue_frontier=Some("TAS-184A"), and article_equivalence_green=false.
